records.stderr_pattern: no space left on device|Error.*No space left
records.description: Docker disk space exhausted — enable BuildKit for better caching and layer dedup

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "failed to register layer: write /usr/lib/libfoo.so: no space left on device" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: OCI runtime.*memory\.limit_in_bytes|OCI runtime.*device or resource busy|Cannot allocate memory
records.description: Docker container OOM or cgroup memory conflict — adjust memory limits

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "OCI runtime create failed: setting cgroup config: failed to write to memory.limit_in_bytes: device or resource busy" >&2; exit 1'
